title: Lodging Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities of an organization or department that provides lodging and other accommodations.

tasks.text: Answer inquiries pertaining to hotel policies and services, and resolve occupants' complaints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in financial activities, such as the setting of room rates, the establishment of budgets, and the allocation of funds to departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer and cooperate with other managers to ensure coordination of hotel activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Greet and register guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor the revenue activity of the hotel or facility.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Manage and maintain temporary or permanent lodging facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train staff members.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and monitor staff performance to ensure efficient operations and adherence to facility's policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate front-office activities of hotels or motels, and resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect guest rooms, public areas, and grounds for cleanliness and appearance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assign duties to workers, and schedule shifts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive and process advance registration payments, mail letters of confirmation, or return checks when registrations cannot be accepted.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview and hire applicants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Purchase supplies, and arrange for outside services, such as deliveries, laundry, maintenance and repair, and trash collection.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect payments and record data pertaining to funds and expenditures.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Develop and implement policies and procedures for the operation of a department or establishment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare required paperwork pertaining to departmental functions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Show, rent, or assign accommodations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform marketing and public relations activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and coordinate the work of staff and convention personnel for meetings to be held at a particular facility.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to staff members by inspecting rooms, setting tables, or doing laundry.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Arrange telephone answering services, deliver mail and packages, or answer questions regarding locations for eating and entertainment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with clients to schedule and plan details of conventions, banquets, receptions and other functions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Book tickets for guests for local tours and attractions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
